title: DrinkWater
description: Drink Water adds a simple thirst system with direct water drinking and a reusable water flask
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/db09edf9eb7aaf40b90dc038930aa2f25f3064f6_0.webp)

Drink Water adds a simple thirst system to Minecraft with direct water drinking and a reusable water flask.

![features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cf6bb8986a77e1a7a72c91ddfdb9f03024d920e.jpeg)

- Drink directly from water sources
- Reusable water flask with visible water levels
- Clean thirst HUD and drink progress bar
- Thirst pauses while swimming or staying idle
- Underwater HUD hides cleanly to avoid bubble overlap
- Flask drinking is blocked underwater

![Screenshot ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f130ef019f0edeaabb71f8e379f41b348eb65fa7_0.webp)
![screenshot1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9a2dcfe35e198edeea6bdb3e3528ad9ea4fc115_0.webp)
![Screenshot1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57f02ac4e39a2e96428b6399d7ff92a60edc8acd_0.webp)
![screen2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51cc08c15e7dc3121fced5acebfdc8a156fc627f_0.webp)

![command](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb663ad412b19b6855aaacd7f981e7383f116c00.jpeg)

- `/waterlevel <number>` is OP only
  
- `/water help` water help shows the mod info, support links, and command help

![support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf8bcc744348c108c15bc6f6e167f76295656ec0.jpeg)
